## Product Brief
1. Vectra AI provides automated threat management solutions for real-time detection of in-progress cyber attacks.
2. They leverage AI agents for security operations, including AI Stitching, Prioritization, Triage, and Analyst.
3. Their focus is on full SOC automation and prioritizing attacks based on business risk.
